    <script>
    function alert(type,msg) {
        let bs_class = (type == "success") ? "alert-success" : "alert-danger";
        let element = document.createElement('div');
        element.innerHTML = `
        <div class="alert ${bs_class} alert-dismissible fade show custom-alert" role="alert">
            <strong class="me-3">${msg}</strong> 
            <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
        </div>`;
            
        document.body.append(element);
    }
</script>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.0.2/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js" integrity="sha384-MrcW6ZMFYlzcLA8Nl+NtUVF0sA7MsXsP1UyJoMp4YLEuNSfAP+JcXn/tWtIaxVXM" crossorigin="anonymous">
        
    </script>
    <script>
        setInterval(() => {
            var xhttp = new XMLHttpRequest();
            xhttp.onreadystatechange = function () {
                if (this.readyState == 4 && this.status == 200) {
                    var data = JSON.parse(this.responseText);
                    //console.log(data);
                    changeStateAlarm(data.fire);
                    changeStateObj("light1", data.light1);
                    changeStateObj("light2", data.light2);
                    changeStateObj("light3", data.light3);
                    changeStateObj("fan1", data.fan1);
                    changeStateObj("fan2", data.fan2);
                    changeStateObj("fan3", data.fan3);
                    calulate_rom_price ("price_1",data.booktime1);
                    calulate_rom_price ("price_2",data.booktime2);
                    calulate_rom_price ("price_3",data.booktime3);
                }
            };
            xhttp.open("GET", "/read", true);
            xhttp.send();
        }, 500);

        function changeStateObj(id, value) {
            if (value) {
                document.getElementById(id).classList.remove("row-value-red");
                document.getElementById(id).classList.add("row-value-green");
            }
            else {
                document.getElementById(id).classList.remove("row-value-green");
                document.getElementById(id).classList.add("row-value-red");
            }
        }
        function changeStateAlarm(value) {
            if (value === 1) {
                document.getElementById("alarm").style.display = "block";
            }
            else {
                document.getElementById("alarm").style.display = "none";
            }
        }

        function get_price (delta_time){
            let second = delta_time / 1000 ; // convert to seconds 
            let hours  = second / 3600 ; 
            let delta_hours = hours - 1 ;
            if (delta_hours < 1) {
                return 50000;
            }else {
                let final_price = 50000;
                while (delta_hours > 1){
                    final_price = final_price + 20000;
                    delta_hours = delta_hours - 1;
                }
                return final_price;
            }

        }
        function calulate_rom_price(id,value) {
            if (value > 1) {
                let now = Date.now(); // Unix timestamp in milliseconds
                let book_time = new Date(value * 1000);
                let delta = now - book_time;
                //onsole.log (delta)
                let temp_str =  "CheckedIn: " + book_time.getDate() + "/" + (book_time.getMonth() + 1) + "/" + book_time.getFullYear() + " " + book_time.getHours() + ":" + book_time.getMinutes() + "| " + get_price(delta).toString(10)+ "  VND";
                document.getElementById(id).innerHTML = temp_str ;
                // console.log (id)
                // console.log (temp_str)
            }
            else {
                document.getElementById(id).innerHTML = "--/--$" ;
            }
        }
    </script>

        document.getElementById("room2_img").src = src3;
        document.getElementById("room3_img").src = src3;

void notFound(AsyncWebServerRequest *request) {
  request->send(404, "text/plain", "Not found");
}

void initWeb() {

  initControl();

  WiFi.mode(WIFI_STA);
  WiFi.begin(ssid, password);
  if (WiFi.waitForConnectResult() != WL_CONNECTED) {
    Serial.printf("WiFi Failed!\n");
    return;
  }

  Serial.print("IP Address: ");
  Serial.println(WiFi.localIP());

  server.on("/", HTTP_GET, [](AsyncWebServerRequest *request) {
    request->send(200, "text/html", index_html);
  });

  // Send a GET request to <IP>/get?message=<message>
  server.on("/read", HTTP_GET, [](AsyncWebServerRequest *request) {
    StaticJsonDocument<200> doc;
    doc["fire"] = fireSensor;
    doc["light1"] = light[0];
    doc["light2"] = light[1];
    doc["light3"] = light[2];
    doc["fan1"] = fan[0];
    doc["fan2"] = fan[1];
    doc["fan3"] = fan[2];
    doc["booktime1"] = booking_time[0];
    doc["booktime2"] = booking_time[1];
    doc["booktime3"] = booking_time[2];
    String res = "";
    serializeJson(doc, res);
    request->send(200, "text/plain", res);
  });

  server.onNotFound(notFound);

  server.begin();
}

void loopWeb(){
  loopControl();
}
